title: Rhythm: news flow
text: Markets opened higher on Friday after positive earnings reports from three major tech firms. Analysts pointed to strong cloud growth and resilient consumer demand. The rally is expected to extend into next week.

character_tips.anna: News flow at 80 WPM. Newsroom speed.
character_tips.maxim: Multi-sentence news = real journalist daily speed.
character_tips.klavochka: Reporting the world at speed, my dear 🌍
